title: Yander group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Yander1-TF.png|thumb|right|250px|Maarek Stele inspecting ''Yander 1''.]]
'''Yander group''' was a group of three [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighters]] operating near the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the three freighters were inspected by personnel stationed at [[Outpost D-34]], namely [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], and found to be carrying foodstuffs and water. Their inspection coincided with a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack on the [[XQ1 Platform|platform]], but due to their peaceful nature, the craft were left to continue on their intended course.
